positive: A whimsical and vibrant forest animal tableau featuring a stylized fox playfully interacting with a luminous owl and delicate flying butterflies, arranged in a central circular composition. The style is modern, clean graphic design mixed with watercolor textures, rendered with thick black outlines and a limited, autumnal color palette (burnt orange, teal, mustard yellow, slate blue). The background should be minimalist and negative space-heavy to ensure print clarity. Excellent contrast and high-fidelity illustration perfect for apparel printing. Studio quality lighting, flat lay perspective.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, letter, dirty, artifact, grain, out of frame, messy, multiple people, bad anatomy, extra limbs
